userMessage: Configure edge trigger CH1 rising 1V using tm_devices

response.text:
Built a verified tm_devices flow for edge trigger on CH1 rising at 1 V.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Replace the empty workspace with a tm_devices flow that sets A trigger type to EDGE, source to CH1, slope to RISE, and level to 1 V.","findings":["tm_devices calls were verified from the MSO6B command tree and are suitable for the MSO4/5/6 family request.","No instrumentIds were provided in the workspace context, so connect/disconnect use empty instrument lists."],"suggestedFixes":["Populate instrumentIds in the connect/disconnect steps if your workspace requires explicit instrument selection.","Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Configure Edge Trigger CH1 Rising 1V","description":"Configure A edge trigger on CH1 with rising slope and 1 V level using tm_devices.","backend":"tm_devices","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set Trigger Type","params":{"code":"scope.commands.trigger.a.type.write(\"EDGE\")","model":"MSO6B","description":"Set A trigger type to EDGE."},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set Trigger Source","params":{"code":"scope.commands.trigger.a.edge.source.write(\"CH1\")","model":"MSO6B","description":"Set edge trigger source to CH1."},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set Trigger Slope","params":{"code":"scope.commands.trigger.a.edge.slope.write(\"RISE\")","model":"MSO6B","description":"Set edge trigger slope to RISE."},"id":"s1_4"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set Trigger Level","params":{"code":"scope.commands.trigger.a.level.ch[1].write(1)","model":"MSO6B","description":"Set CH1 trigger level to 1 V."},"id":"s1_5"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]},"id":"s1_6"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Replace the empty workspace with a tm_devices flow that sets A trigger type to EDGE, source to CH1, slope to RISE, and level to 1 V.
findings: tm_devices calls were verified from the MSO6B command tree and are suitable for the MSO4/5/6 family request.
No instrumentIds were provided in the workspace context, so connect/disconnect use empty instrument lists.
suggestedFixes: Populate instrumentIds in the connect/disconnect steps if your workspace requires explicit instrument selection.
Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "scope1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: Configure Edge Trigger CH1 Rising 1V
flow.description: Configure A edge trigger on CH1 with rising slope and 1 V level using tm_devices.

params.description: Set A trigger type to EDGE.
Set edge trigger source to CH1.
Set edge trigger slope to RISE.
Set CH1 trigger level to 1 V.
